commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Word. The angel spoke no more at this time. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: That is, "the end of that word and discourse which the Lord revealed to me in this present vision."

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: Up to this point the Book of Daniel was written in the Chaldee and Syriac language. All the rest that follows up to the very end of the volume we read in Hebrew.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
